prompt: A multi-tenant order database works when customer IDs are globally distinct, but repeated customer IDs can leak names across tenant reports and permit cross-tenant references. Diagnose the relational contract and repair both read and write integrity. Public single-tenant tests pass. Edit at most two candidate source files.

repo_files.db/order_summary.sql:
SELECT
    o.id AS order_id,
    c.name AS customer_name,
    o.total_cents
FROM orders AS o
JOIN customers AS c
    ON c.id = o.customer_id
WHERE o.tenant_id = :tenant_id
ORDER BY o.id, c.name;
repo_files.db/order_totals.sql:
SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS order_count,
    COALESCE(SUM(total_cents), 0) AS total_cents
FROM orders
WHERE tenant_id = :tenant_id;
